rationale.R1.2: Delegation maps directly and exclusively onto logical consistency. The artifact contains at least two load-bearing logical failures: (1) the Portability section asserts the framework requires 'no labeled difficulty information' and no 'ground-truth curation', which directly contradicts the Training section describing a 480k supervised corpus with binary labels produced by task-specific judges — the very definition of labeled ground-truth curation; (2) the Cost Analysis concludes from AUC 0.89 on the binary routing task that end-task accuracy is preserved to within 0.5 points of the pure-L baseline — AUC measures ranking quality of the router's classifier, not downstream task accuracy, so this inferential step is logically invalid without an additional monotone link between routing AUC and task accuracy delta, which is never established.
